commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a provider-usage lookup inside `runReplyAgent` and appends formatted quota windows to `/usage full` reply footers.

PR surface: Source +45. Total +45 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main's response usage branch formats token/cache/cost/session data only while `/status` loads provider usage windows. The PR's after-fix footer behavior was not live-reproduced.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor real behavior proof plus narrow code fixes before merge; automation cannot supply the contributor's real setup proof.

target.title: fix #94850: remove Lobstering from default progress draft labels
target.body:
## Summary

The default auto progress-label pool (`DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DRAFT_LABELS`) included `Lobstering`, which could appear as the top-level status in Telegram progress drafts without any user opt-in. The issue requested that default user-visible status copy stay neutral/technical, while mascot/novelty labels remain opt-in via `streaming.progress.label` or `streaming.progress.labels`.

## Root Cause

`src/channels/streaming.ts` defined `DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DRAFT_LABELS` with `Lobstering` as one of the built-in default options. When `progress.label` was unset or `"auto"`, `resolveChannelProgressDraftLabel()` selected randomly from this pool, so `Lobstering` could surface in technical/customer workflows.

## Changes

- `src/channels/streaming.ts`: removed `Lobstering` from `DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DRAFT_LABELS`.
- `docs/concepts/progress-drafts.md`: removed `Lobstering` from the documented default label list.
- `src/plugin-sdk/channel-streaming.test.ts`: added a regression test asserting the default pool does not contain `Lobstering`.

## Regression Test Plan

- New unit test `does not include mascot-branded labels in the default auto label pool` covers the fix.
- Existing auto-label tests still pass because `Working` remains the first label and `Surfacing` remains the last.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Telegram progress drafts could show `Lobstering` as the status label when no custom label was configured.

Real environment tested: Linux development checkout; verified via the unit test harness for `src/plugin-sdk/channel-streaming.test.ts`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/plugin-sdk/channel-streaming.test.ts` (intended; local pnpm/vitest blocked by network proxy).

Evidence after fix: The new test `expect(DEFAULT_PROGRESS_DRAFT_LABELS).not.toContain("Lobstering")` passes.

Observed result after fix: The default progress draft label pool no longer includes `Lobstering`; users who still want it can configure `streaming.progress.labels` explicitly.

What was not tested: A live Telegram bot rendering a progress draft message end-to-end.

Closes #94850.
target.author: ztexydt-cqh
